intro: Messi fans pair the Argentina flag 🇦🇷 with the soccer ball ⚽ and the GOAT 🐐 to crown the greatest of all time. These combos are made for stan accounts, bios, and comments. Copy a single emoji from the sections below, or grab a full combo set with one click.
